name: Kashtiratheosis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六世壊他化自在天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クシャトリラ・パーピヤス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Kashtira" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Kashtira" monster with a different Attribute from your Deck in Defense Position, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your banished "Kashtira" cards, except "Kashtiratheosis"; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Kashtiratheosis" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Kashtira" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Kashtira" monster with a different Attribute from your Deck in Defense Position, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your banished "Kashtira" cards, except "Kashtiratheosis"; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Kashtiratheosis" once per turn.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
